commentary_text: Pitched full and just outside off. Driven to covers without much power in the shot first up
Strays down the leg side. On the fuller side once more, some decent swing in it but strikes Pant's pads and dribbles down to the diving KL with his gloves on
Pant shows why he's batting up top!Mukesh bowls it full, too full, and right under Pant's eyes. A checked drive pushed down to long-on and he's collected a classy four first up
Good comeback! Pulls the line shorter, Mukesh also swings it into Pant. The batter hunches as he defends awkwardly, down the pitch
Tries innovation, finds empty air!He shuffles into the leg side and tries to scoop this into his leg side. Slight appeal but no bat on that one
Bowls it quite wide. The ball swings away and Pant is happy to just watch it drift past him
Bowled on a great length, where it lands in front of Pant and then takes an exaggerated swing away from him, off the pitch. Pant tucks his bat towards him and it's been a good start for DC
You bowl it there, I spank it through covers.Too short, gives width outside off, and Marsh stands still to just drill this to the deep cover boundary
Bowls it fuller and keeps it more tucked into the off stump line too. Swings back at Marsh, who defends
Too short, too wide once more. Marsh is deep in his crease and he lofts this over covers with ease. It's always running away to the ropes after that
Full and just driven down to mid-on
Ngidi is correcting his earlier error with a fuller line here, gives no width once more. Pant defends this into the leg side and Ngidi collects
Pant finds some width outside off, from a good length. He plays this late and glides this towards backward point to retain the strike
Pitches full and swings away from the left-hander. He drives this down to mid-off and takes off for a quick run
Bowls it slower, around 135.6 clicks. Marsh tries to glide it behind him too, but backward point collects
Marsh goes for a drive and ends up French-cutting himself! The ball lands full, close to his feet. He drives it and the ball dribbles behind him, towards fine leg instead
Same length but strays onto his pads. Marsh flicks this under his head, towards deep square leg, and will be glad to get off the strike
On a length, swinging away from Pant. He plays this towards long leg without much force behind the shot, and jogs through for a single

MUKESH IS RUNNING OFF, Tahir-style! What's happened here!?Marsh drills a drive off a good length straight down the pitch. Too straight, in fact, because Mukesh gets a hand on it and the ball ricochets into the stumps. Pant is out of his crease, and what an unfortunate way to be dismissed...
Floats it up, and drops right in front of Markram. Defended down the pitch
Gets more width now, he goes on the backfoot and cuts this straight to point
On a length once more. Markram stays in his crease and flicks this into the mid-wicket zone and takes off for the other end of the pitch
Outside off, on a good length. Marsh happy to continue the trend of this over and defend it towards mid-off
Pitched fuller, closer to the stumps too. Marsh is more than happy to just drive this towards mid-off
Impeccable timing!On a length and outside off, as it has been all over. Except Markram is on the back foot in a flash and just covers this into the covers boundary

Mukesh goes up in a roar! The ball dropped back of a length, and swung right into Marsh's pads. He got no bat on it as he just swung across the line. Runs away towards the deep third boundary, a tad unlucky for Mukesh but Marsh will take this

Classy!Marsh counters Mukesh by just taking a step down the pitch. It's enough for him to meet this ball full. A lofted straight drive, right down the ground, and he holds the pose as the ball sails over the ropes
Mukesh returns to his good length delivery, just a little down leg. Marsh drives this down to mid-on but can't get it past the fielder
Mukesh tries to counter him by bouncing it right into the pitch. But it sails wayyyy over Marsh's head. Time to reload
On a fuller length and right on the pads once more. Marsh gets cramped a little as he drives this towards mid-on once more
Pulls it back to a good length again, moving into Markram. Goes for a drive but edges this into his pads instead
On a length and swings in from outside off. Markram times this sweetly as he drives, but the ball goes straight to mid-off inside the ring
97 clicks, slows through the air and Marsh is on his feet for a huge sweep through the air. But misses the line and thuds into his body

Now that's a beauty from Axar! Drops this close to the batter after flighting it through the air. Spins in, and beats Marsh's inside half of the bat. And KL Rahul misses it too, so it goes to the boundary
Marsh gets bat on this one, at least. Drifting down leg and he smashes this across the line... But straight to square leg
And now Markram establishes his authority! The ball comes right under his eyes, too full. Markram swings at this and it's drilled over the ropes right in front of him

Now THAT'S a comeback!Axar bowls this one quicker, pulls back the length and pushes it to the off stump line. Markram goes for another big swing after opening up his front foot. But the ball rifles through to the stumps and lights up the bails
Badoni begins with a solid defense towards mid-off. Ball was bowled on a length and outside off, and he had plenty of time to get on the front foot with this one
Marsh gets no timing on this as he goes for another hoick. Outside off and back of a length, Marsh reaches for this and slashes it, but it drills into the pitch and goes to point
On a full length, just outside off. Badoni drives it to covers

Badoni departs without scoring!Natarajan angles this away from the batter after landing it on a length, outside off. Badoni has no idea how to play at that as he just goes for a wild slow, and KL collects behind the stumps
Bowled full-ish, just outside off. Pooran is quick to get down at this ball and defend it towards mid-off
On a length and kept outside off. Pooran drives this towards the covers
Kept outside off and skids off the pitch. Marsh goes for a huge hoick with fixed feet once more, but swishes at air
And there's the classic Pooran slog sweep!So smooth with it. Bowled on a perfectly okay length outside off. Pooran down on his knees in a flash and just rifles this into the deep square boundary
Smart comeback from Kuldeep! Slows it down. Pooran gets on his knees for another sweep, but misses as the ball slowwws past him
Still slow, and kept even more outside off. Pooran waits just that extra second before sweeping it towards deep mid-wicket
On a good length now, just outside leg. Spins back into him and he tucks this off his hips and towards square leg
Too straight, right on the stumps. Gets on his knees and sweeps this finer, into deep fine leg boundary now
On a length. Marsh gets on the backfoot and defends this right back at the bowler
Ngidi floats this outside off. Pooran leans into a drive away from his balance, but times this perfectly as it dribbles away towards deep extra cover
Slow and kept outside off, Marsh tries to drive this late but gets no timing on it

And now Marsh regains his timing, and how!The ball is on a good length again, straight at the stumps. Marsh swings at it with an impeccably straight bat. Hold the pose once more, please. Over the ropes and the waiting fielder who tries to lunge at it, to no avail
On a full length, and Marsh stays back in his crease to glide this towards deep point

That's almost vintage Bravo, but somehow better!Ball of the tournament so far, really. Pooran goes on the front foot, trying to play this full ball down into the off-side. But Ngidi has disguised his off-cutter to perfection. It floats through the air, impossibly slow, and somehow, sneaks past Pooran's bat and rattles his stumps. Magical T20 bowling, this

The big-hitting Samad is almost rattled first up. Another slowwww one, somehow sneaks past Samad on the front foot, trying to flick this away. Big appeal for an LBW, umpire says no, they review... Pitching outside off, impact in line, but wickets missing, as looked likely even at first glance
Marsh latches onto this one with panache!Floated up, outside off, and there to be hit. Marsh gets on his legs and just swipes this across the line. Disappears over the cow corner boundary
Kuldeep pushes this closer to the batter, but still outside off. Marsh reaches for this and defends this late, straight to backward point

Kuldeep's been floating it up, has taken a few big hits... and now he bears fruit! It's slow as ever through the air, and just spins away from the batter and is closer to him than Marsh might have accounted for. It was a googly, too. Marsh's bat twists in his hand and he mistimes this in the air. Stubbs pouches this at mid-off
Paddles it fine first ball. Took the front leg well outside off and leant across early, was behind the length ball and played it delicately
Through everyone. Given runs. Not sure how the edge on the sweep went over the keeper but it does. Kuldeep giving it air and going full
Quick single to cover's left. Length ball just outside off, punched defensively
Length outside off, flat, punched to cover
At the stumps, just a touch fuller than the last one. Clipped with a nice follow-through to long-on
Axar runs right and denies the single. Slinger pitched fullish on leg, worked off the front foot
Lot of width on that length ball, cut to deep point
Length on leg, punched off the back foot to long-on. 95ks
Uppish, lands and goes to the bowler. Fullish on middle, didn't come on to the bat. Mukul got forward and was into the forward punch too early. Back to the bowler
Lots happening in the action, ball does too much. Length just down leg, beats the flick and tickles the pad. Too quick for the keeper
This might be the break-free over. Proper long-hop, ample time to adjust to the turn away, and then pulls it between deep square leg and deep midwicket
Shortish on leg, pulled to deep square leg. Samad wound himself proper, wanted another boundary there
Goes back, stays beside the length ball on middle. Flicked to deep midwicket
Driven nicely, beats short cover. Deep cover runs left and stops it. Length ball just outside off
Pitched up on off, driven to cover's right. Good diving stop to the right. 93ks. Vipraj gets out of the over well
Length just outside off, goes across to off and stays behind as he punches to backward point
Shortish outside off, cut without full power. Deep point runs left to keep it to two
Excellent yorker. Samad was sliding off side but was stopped in his tracks. Tried to jam it straight, got an inside edge that landed and popped behind
Uses the pace even though it's a slower ball. The shortish ball bounced a lot, around head-height. Angling away outside off. Samad went for the upper cut, got it off the edge. Beats short third
Pitched up outside off, driven to long-off
Slower one just outside off, the fullish ball is driven with a flourish, to long-off

Leading edge lollipops back to the bowler87ks stock ball on a fullish length, Choudhary got his weight forward and tried to nudge it to the leg side. Closed the bat-face too early. Kuldeep didn't have to move much
Almost carries to cover! Delightful flight again, 80ks, length ball just outside off. Shahbaz was also too early into the punch to cover, bottom hand came off
Goes back and square drives with the spin. Rolls to deep point
Shorter side of length on leg, goes back and flicks it away to deep midwicket's left. Great running to get two
A bit of width on that length ball. Might've been a googly, spun away. Cut to point
Length on fourth, goes back and drives to cover
Length just outside off, guided to backward point's right. Good tumbling stop from Kuldeep
Goes across to off stump, gets inside the line of the length ball and flicks to deep square leg
Clobbered! This is length-picking. Natarajan's lost some pace, Samad can camp in the crease for the length ball to arrive and wallops it with a closed bat face over midwicket
Change of length, he's ready for it! Missed yorker, and the low full toss is bashed from just outside off. Clean swing, upper-body springing back as he drove it straight
Pitched right up, punched to long-off
Fullish on leg, 132ks, flicked to long leg. Timeout taken
Looks to thump the full ball coming in wide of long-on, gets it to him instead
Length on middle, driven to long-off
Length just outside off, goes back and on one leg. Punches it to deep point
Fullish ball on leg, flicked towards deep midwicket. Axar charges in and throws it to the keeper, but Samad was the one running in from the other end while Shahbaz stood his ground
Wide and full, slapped to long-off
Length on leg, flicked to deep square leg. 89ks. Kuldeep seen off, he ends with a two-for
Slower one on a length just outside off, punched towards cover. Ngidi changing his direction - to the left - as he jumps before delivering
Around the wicket, but width given. Back of length, there for Shahbaz to stand tall and carve it over backward point
Slower one leads to a French cut. Looked to defend to cover, got it to short fine leg. Ngidi going fuller side of length just outside off
Dipping low full toss on off, Samad's upper body falls forward as he flicks it through square leg
Length outside off, wipes it to short third. Wants the single, not on
Full on leg, flicked through the leg side of the pitch. Ngidi charges but can't stop the single
Turns it to deep square leg
Looks to slog the full ball, gets it off the bottom of the bat to long-on

That rockets... straight to Miller at long-off!That was travelling at pace, very flat, Miller must've been taken aback. He was a few feet in the ropes, was leaning back as the ball came, then took it reverse-cupped. Took a step or two back as he got carried by the momentum. Was a slot ball in the hitting range, Samad drove it hard with a full follow-through
Yorker outside off, squeezed to deep midwicket
Very short outside off, 133ks, pulled into the ground. Goes to deep midwicket
Right up, taken at cover point. Low full toss swerving away towards the base of off stump. Shami cleared the front leg and looked to go over cover. Got it off the bottom of the bat
Slower one into the pitch outside off, Shahbaz goes too hard for the cut. Misses
Dipping slower ball is full outside off, driven to deep cover

Nortje's into the shot too early, goes through with it. Long-off takes it. Pitched right up, just outside off. Nortje wound up big, took a small, straight stride and tried to munch a lofted drive down the ground.

Another slower ball... ends the innings! Very full, just outside off. Mohsin clears the front leg and tries to jam it into the ground. Gets an edge that floats to short third. All smiles and high-fives among Ngidi and Axar
